name: alias in pipeline
script:
alias upper='tr a-z A-Z'
echo hello | upper

name: unalias removes alias
script:
alias hi='echo hello'
hi
unalias hi
hi

name: shopt expand_aliases off prevents expansion
script:
shopt -u expand_aliases
alias hi='echo hello'
hi

name: shopt expand_aliases on restores expansion
script:
shopt -s expand_aliases
alias hi='echo hello'
hi

name: alias overwrites previous definition
script:
alias x='echo first'
alias x='echo second'
x
